scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:unit && E2E_RUN_DATABASE_TESTS=1 pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:browser: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; pnpm run test:e2e --project=browser "$@"' --
scripts.test:db: E2E_BASE_URL= pnpm run test:local sh -c 'pnpm run db:reset && pnpm exec supabase test db'
scripts.test:e2e: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; pnpm run test:local pnpm exec playwright test "$@"' --
scripts.test:integration: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; pnpm run test:e2e --project=integration "$@"' --
scripts.test:local: sh -c 'if [ "$#" -eq 0 ]; then echo "test:local requires a command." >&2; exit 64; fi; ownsSupabase=0; skipLocalSupabase=0; commandPid=; signalExitCode=0; cleanup() { exitCode=$?; trap - EXIT HUP INT TERM; if [ "$ownsSupabase" -eq 1 ] && ! pnpm exec supabase stop; then [ "$exitCode" -ne 0 ] || exitCode=1; fi; exit "$exitCode"; }; relaySignal() { signalExitCode=$1; signalName=$2; if [ -n "$commandPid" ]; then kill "-$signalName" "$commandPid" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }; trap cleanup EXIT; trap "relaySignal 129 HUP" HUP; trap "relaySignal 130 INT" INT; trap "relaySignal 143 TERM" TERM; if [ -n "${E2E_BASE_URL:-}" ]; then skipLocalSupabase=1; fi; for argument in "$@"; do if [ "$argument" = "--list" ]; then skipLocalSupabase=1; fi; done; if [ "$skipLocalSupabase" -eq 0 ]; then pnpm exec supabase status -o json >/dev/null 2>&1; supabaseStatus=$?; if [ "$signalExitCode" -ne 0 ]; then exit "$signalExitCode"; fi; if [ "$supabaseStatus" -ne 0 ]; then ownsSupabase=1; pnpm exec supabase start --yes || exit $?; fi; fi; if [ "$signalExitCode" -ne 0 ]; then exit "$signalExitCode"; fi; "$@" & commandPid=$!; commandExit=0; while :; do wait "$commandPid"; commandExit=$?; if [ "$signalExitCode" -eq 0 ] || ! kill -0 "$commandPid" 2>/dev/null; then break; fi; done; if [ "$signalExitCode" -ne 0 ]; then commandExit=$signalExitCode; fi; exit "$commandExit"' --
